title: Dwindham
compiled_truth: Dwindham is an external contact at [Uclink4](companies/uclink4). Over the corpus period (1999-09-22 to 2001-08-30), Dwindham sent 36 and received 220 emails, totalling 256 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (27), [Jjackson](people/jjackson-haas) (24), [Jcjcal02](people/jcjcal02-aol) (22), [Guinney](people/guinney-haas) (17), [Jdasovic](people/jdasovic) (10).
